caption: A man with dark hair and a beard, wearing a white shirt and a grey blazer, stands on a stage during a presentation. He is positioned to the left of a large projection screen that displays a blue background with white text. The text on the screen reads, "BUT FOR US? Got an overview in scaling data pipelines Airflow components (Celery, ML, etc) Difference between ML & Data Pipelines Overview of Airflow + Usecase THE BIG PICTURE". At the bottom of the screen, a white banner contains the "europython" logo—a red snake—alongside the text "Edinburgh 23-29 July 2018". Across the sequence, the man shifts his posture and gestures with his hands while speaking. In the first frame, he stands with his hands slightly raised; by the final frame, he has leaned slightly forward, gesturing with his right hand towards the audience.
